questionHtml: Suggest why it is advisable for those living in northerly or southerly latitudes (that is away from the equator) to take vitamin D supplements during the winter.
markschemeHtml: not enough sunlight/UV light «for synthesis of vitamin D in the skin» ✔

meta.title: Suggest why it is advisable for those living in northerly or southerly latitudes (that is away from the equator) to take vitamin D supplements during the winter.
